chunks.title: God's Justice and Discipline
chunks.reason: Elihu introduces his speech and describes how God disciplines the righteous and wicked.

chunks.title: Warning to Job
chunks.reason: Elihu contrasts the godless with Job and warns him against pride and wrath.

chunks.title: God's Exalted Power
chunks.reason: Elihu concludes by describing God's sovereignty over nature and His judgment of peoples.
